details.test: Task 1: Submit streetscape redesign service inquiry
Task 2: Save TOD project to shortlist and reopen
Task 3: Save 15-minute city article to reading list and reopen
Task 4: Estimator – select cheapest eligible brownfield package
Task 5: Register for earliest eligible community engagement webinar
Task 6: Request 30-minute intro call with transit urban designer
Task 7: Download tactical urbanism toolkit and add note
Task 8: Apply online for Urban Planner role in New York
Task 9: Contact Berlin office for in-person workshop
